title: Hyphydrus pictus Klug 1834
author: Ribera, Ignacio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Hyphydrus pictus  Klug, 1834    Published records.  RÉGIMBART (1897) (as “  Hyphydrus scriptus  Klug ”); PEDERZANI (2003); HÁJEK & REITER (2014).   Material examined.  Loc. 1: 5 spec. (plus larvae) (one spec. used for DNA extraction, voucher No. IBE-RA555); Loc. 3: 3 spec.; Loc. 5: 1 spec. (plus one larvae); Oman, Sayq, 23º04′32″N 57º37′42″E, 1958 m, 9.x.2005 S. Carranza, E.N. Arnold & D. Donaire leg.: 1 spec. (used for DNA extraction, voucher No. IBE-RA549).
